Notice Of Motion Adn Motion To Enforce Written Settlement And Obtain Judgment Thereon Against Defendants; Declaration And Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF EDITHA NALUZ ' Motion To Enforce Written Settlement And Obtain Judgment Thereon Against Defendants MARIA BROOKS, STREAMLINE FUNDING INCORPORATED, MANUAL BALLEZA DULOS, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA NEW HORIZON REALTY, JANELYN PERUCHO (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS JANELYN PANUCHO AKA PANUCHO) DBA PRP INVESTMENT GROUP IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AGAINST SETTLING DEFENDANTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $30,000 AND PROVIDING THAT $22,000 HAS BEEN PAID AGAINST THE JUDGMENT. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189
301/PJB

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Francois X. Sorba, Esq. appeared with plaintif Editha Naluz, who was placed under oath and examined.
Dennis Castro was placed under oath and served as Tagalog speaking interpreter for plaintiff.
No appearance by defendant Maria Ramos.
Default entered against defendant Maria Ramos on December 31, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed today, September 16, 2008.
All other defendants and cross-defendants have either settled or been dismissed.

Plaintiff's Exhibit List for this prove-up hearing, containing Exhibits 1 through 11, was filed today, September 16, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Editha Naluz, and against the Defaulted Defendant Maria Ramos as follows:

Damages/Principal - $308,346.70.
Punitive Damages - $300,000.00
Attorney's Fees - $24,425.00.
Costs - $462.98, for a total of $633,234.68.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
